CREATE TABLE geo_shapes (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, geometry GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO geo_shapes (id, geometry) VALUES (1, st_point(10, 30));
INSERT INTO geo_shapes (id, geometry) VALUES (2, st_point(20, 40));
INSERT INTO geo_shapes (id, geometry) VALUES (3, st_point(30, 50));
INSERT INTO geo_shapes (id, geometry) VALUES (4, st_polygonfromtext('POLYGON((10 10, 20 10, 20 20, 10 20, 10 10))'));
SELECT (bif:ST_SRID(geometry)) FROM geo_shapes WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM geo_shapes WHERE geometry IS NOT NULL);
SELECT a.id, b.id, (bif:ST_SRID(a.geometry) + bif:ST_SRID(b.geometry)) AS total_srid FROM geo_shapes a JOIN geo_shapes b ON a.id <> b.id;
SELECT (bif:ST_SRID(geometry)) FROM geo_shapes WHERE geometry IS NULL;
INSERT INTO geo_shapes (id, geometry) VALUES (5, st_point(NULL, NULL));
SELECT (bif:ST_SRID(geometry)) FROM (SELECT geometry FROM geo_shapes WHERE id = 4) AS subquery;
